seed_desc: AI talent marketplace matching human domain experts to frontier labs; runs a proprietary AI interviewing/vetting platform. ~$2B ARR run rate, ~400 FT staff, $10B Series C (Oct 2025), in talks at $20B (Jul 2026).
seed_why: Mercor's core product is AI-driven candidate interviewing/vetting plus a talent-labor marketplace: this is exactly the FlairX AI-interview + ResumeGenerator/Outreach recruiting-engine problem space. Direct pitch on candidate evaluation, matching, and human-in-the-loop workflows.

seed_desc: AI-training/data-labeling division of Handshake (the university career network), using its 18M+ student/expert network for RLHF and model eval. ~$1.1B annualized gross revenue (Apr 2026), $3.5B valuation.
seed_why: Handshake is the university career-network vendor (USC uses it), and Handshake AI turns that network into a labeling/eval marketplace. Doubles as a warm USC/Trojan angle plus a direct recruiting-tech + expert-marketplace fit with FlairX/Outreach.

seed_desc: AI vetting + contractor-management platform for data labeling/training; ~3 yrs old, $35M Series A at $500M valuation (01 Advisors). ~$300M annualized (Apr 2026). Smallest/most founder-accessible of the lane.
seed_why: Micro1's AI interview/vetting engine is a near-mirror of FlairX; small enough that a founder/early operator can create a fall product/ops slot on the spot. Highest founder-yes probability in this bucket.

seed_desc: Bootstrapped RLHF/data-labeling leader serving Google, OpenAI, Anthropic. ~$1.2B revenue (2024), in talks to raise at $15B+. Fully remote culture.
seed_why: Surge runs high-quality expert labeling and RLHF workflows at scale; Hevo data-pipeline + FlairX applied-AI background maps to data-quality ops and eval workflow product. Remote-first removes the LA constraint.

seed_desc: Coding/reasoning data + AGI-advancement talent platform; $2.2B valuation ($111M raise Mar 2025). Large India engineering footprint.
seed_why: Turing pairs a developer-talent marketplace with coding/reasoning data ops; strong Thapar/India warm-path plus a former-engineer credibility fit for forward-deployed / product-ops work.

seed_desc: RLHF + operations-as-a-service provider (Microsoft, Cohere, Mistral, Perplexity). ~$134M rev 2024 (profitable), $100M raise Sep 2025 at $2B+. Remote-first.
seed_why: Invisible's ops-as-a-service + workflow-automation model is a direct match to Outreach/ResumeGenerator agentic-ops work and Hevo pipeline ops. Remote-first removes LA constraint; profitable and scaling fast.

seed_desc: Data-annotation + model-evaluation platform (founded 2018, Manu Sharma) bundled with Alignerr, its managed expert-annotator network. Positioned as the neutral independent alternative post-Scale exodus.
seed_why: Labelbox is a data-platform + eval product at core: Hevo data-infra background plus applied-AI eval work (FlairX) gives a platform/product-ops pitch. Alignerr network side matches recruiting/marketplace ops.

seed_desc: Data-centric AI platform (programmatic labeling + expert data-development + eval) out of Stanford AI lab; Series C, ~$1B valuation. Enterprise + frontier-lab data development.
seed_why: Snorkel's data-development/eval platform is a direct data-infra + applied-AI fit: Hevo pipelines + FlairX applied AI support a platform-product or product-ops pitch.

seed_desc: Global data-labeling / expert-data platform for LLM training and eval; crowd + expert workforce serving frontier labs.
seed_why: Toloka's expert-data marketplace + workflow ops match the recruiting-engine and data-ops story; broad remote workforce ops fit for product-ops/forward-deployed.

seed_desc: Vetted-participant marketplace for AI training data and human research/eval; used by labs and researchers.
seed_why: Prolific is a vetted-human marketplace for AI data/eval: recruiting-engine + candidate-vetting story (FlairX/Outreach) maps directly to their supply/matching product.
